blockedReasons.summary: Runtime readiness remains blocked for the Gemma 3N E4B plus KV260 target.
Model assets are external and no reviewed local asset input boundary exists.
No target device session exists and no board runtime status is measured.
The local chat runtime is not implemented or started.

handoffRefs.summary: Model/runtime descriptor data is consumed by reference only.
Runtime readiness is consumed as local data only.
Device/session status is consumed as local data only.
Base chat/session state is consumed as local data only.

limitations: Data-only chat model status fixture; no model load is attempted.
No prompts, responses, transcripts, model paths, generated artifacts, private paths, secrets, or tokens are stored.
No KV260 hardware access, serial access, network call, provider call, telemetry, upload, or write-back is performed.
Model load controls remain disabled until runtime readiness, model asset, and device/session evidence are available.
This is not a release, tag, versioned compatibility commitment, MCP, LSP, IDE, marketplace, or telemetry implementation.

loadActions.label: select model target
loadActions.launcherAction: Render target metadata from checked fixtures only.
loadActions.userAction: Review the target model descriptor in the future chat UI.

loadActions.label: configure model assets
loadActions.launcherAction: Do not read or echo local asset paths.
loadActions.userAction: Provide model assets only after a reviewed local input boundary exists.

loadActions.label: load model
loadActions.launcherAction: Refuse model load while runtime readiness is blocked.
loadActions.userAction: Load only after runtime readiness and model asset checks are evidence-backed.

loadActions.label: refresh status
loadActions.userAction: Refresh the model status display from checked local fixtures.

statusRows.displayPolicy: show descriptor id and target label without model paths
statusRows.label: model descriptor
statusRows.summary: Gemma 3N E4B is represented by the checked descriptor fixture only.

statusRows.displayPolicy: show blocked state without local paths or filenames
statusRows.label: model assets

statusRows.label: runtime readiness
statusRows.summary: Runtime readiness remains blocked and not yet evidence-backed.

statusRows.displayPolicy: show inactive target state without probing hardware
statusRows.label: device session
statusRows.summary: No KV260 target session exists in this fixture.

statusRows.label: load operation
statusRows.summary: Model load controls stay disabled until readiness evidence exists.

statusRows.displayPolicy: show unavailable context state without token data

statusRows.label: assistant response
statusRows.summary: No response can be generated because no model runtime is active.
